case_title: KEVIN C. TIELL VS. TOM LOVELACE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIELL, KEVIN C.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$200.00) SERVED NOV-21-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOVELACE, TOM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TIELL, KEVIN C. AS TO DEFENDANT LOVELACE, TOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIELL, KEVIN C.
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL 1/03/22 SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF WITH REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-15-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KEVIN C. TIELL IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT TOM LOVELACE IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $200 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-15TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
